skills.description: Manage Asana tasks, projects, and workspaces through an OAuth app.
skills.desc_zh: 通过 OAuth 应用管理 Asana 任务、项目和工作区。
skills.desc_en: Manage Asana tasks, projects, and workspaces through an OAuth app.

env.name: ASANA_ACCESS_TOKEN
env.help_text: Short-lived Asana access token injected by Sanqian after account connection. Do not ask users to paste refresh tokens or client secrets here.

fields.name: client_id
fields.help_text: Asana OAuth client ID for the OAuth app you configure for this device.

fields.name: client_secret
fields.help_text: Asana OAuth client secret from the OAuth app you configure for this device.

notes.zh: 先创建或复用你自己的 Asana OAuth 应用，再把 https://auth.sanqian.ai/skills/auth/callback 加到允许的回调地址里。
notes.en: Create or reuse your own Asana OAuth app, then add https://auth.sanqian.ai/skills/auth/callback as an allowed redirect URI.

notes.zh: 把这个应用的 client_id 和 client_secret 填在下方即可。这台设备上的其他 Asana skill 都可以复用这份配置。
notes.en: Paste that app's client_id and client_secret in the fields below. Other Asana skills on this device can reuse the same provider configuration.

notes: Sanqian keeps Asana refresh state on this device and injects ASANA_ACCESS_TOKEN only for this skill at request time.
Do not ask end users to paste authorization codes or refresh tokens into the skill runtime. Configure the OAuth app once in Sanqian settings instead.

skills.description: Manage Google Calendar events through a Google OAuth app configured on this device.
skills.desc_zh: 通过你在这台设备上配置的 Google OAuth 应用管理 Google 日历事件。
skills.desc_en: Manage Google Calendar events through a Google OAuth app configured on this device.

env.name: GOOGLE_ACCESS_TOKEN
env.help_text: Short-lived Google access token injected by Sanqian after Google account connection. Do not ask users to paste refresh tokens or client secrets here.

fields.name: client_id
fields.help_text: Google OAuth client ID for the OAuth app you configure on this device.

fields.name: client_secret
fields.help_text: Google OAuth client secret from the OAuth app you configure on this device.

notes.zh: 先创建或选择你自己的 Google Cloud 项目，然后在 Google Auth Platform 里配置 OAuth consent screen。
notes.en: Create or select your own Google Cloud project, then configure the OAuth consent screen under Google Auth Platform.

notes.zh: 为这台设备上要使用的 Google skill 启用 Google Tasks API 和/或 Google Calendar API。
notes.en: Enable the Google Tasks API and/or Google Calendar API for the Google skills you want to use on this device.

notes.zh: 创建一个类型为 Web application 的 OAuth Client ID。
notes.en: Create an OAuth Client ID of type 'Web application'.

notes.zh: 把 https://auth.sanqian.ai/skills/auth/callback 加到授权回调地址里，然后把这个应用的 client_id 和 client_secret 填在下方。
notes.en: Add https://auth.sanqian.ai/skills/auth/callback as an authorized redirect URI, then paste that app's client_id and client_secret in the fields below.

notes.zh: 如果这个 OAuth 应用还处于测试模式，把你准备连接的 Google 账号加入 test users。
notes.en: If the OAuth app is still in testing mode, add the Google account you plan to connect as a test user.

notes.zh: 测试中的未验证应用通常会看到 Google 的风险提示页。确认这是你自己创建的应用后，点击 Advanced，再继续进入该应用完成授权即可。
notes.en: Unverified apps in testing usually show Google's warning page. After confirming this is the OAuth app you created, click Advanced and continue to the app to finish authorization.

fields.name: client_secret

notes.zh: 先创建或选择你自己的 Google Cloud 项目，然后在 Google Auth Platform 里配置 OAuth consent screen。
notes.en: Create or select your own Google Cloud project, then configure the OAuth consent screen under Google Auth Platform.

notes.zh: 为这台设备上要使用的 Google skill 启用 Google Tasks API 和/或 Google Calendar API。
notes.en: Enable the Google Tasks API and/or Google Calendar API for the Google skills you want to use on this device.

notes.zh: 创建一个类型为 Web application 的 OAuth Client ID。
notes.en: Create an OAuth Client ID of type 'Web application'.

notes.zh: 把 https://auth.sanqian.ai/skills/auth/callback 加到授权回调地址里，然后把这个应用的 client_id 和 client_secret 填在下方。
notes.en: Add https://auth.sanqian.ai/skills/auth/callback as an authorized redirect URI, then paste that app's client_id and client_secret in the fields below.

notes.zh: 如果这个 OAuth 应用还处于测试模式，把你准备连接的 Google 账号加入 test users。
notes.en: If the OAuth app is still in testing mode, add the Google account you plan to connect as a test user.

notes.zh: 测试中的未验证应用通常会看到 Google 的风险提示页。确认这是你自己创建的应用后，点击 Advanced，再继续进入该应用完成授权即可。
notes.en: Unverified apps in testing usually show Google's warning page. After confirming this is the OAuth app you created, click Advanced and continue to the app to finish authorization.

env.name: SENTRY_AUTH_TOKEN
env.help_text: Create a read-only Sentry auth token with project:read, event:read, and org:read scopes.

notes: Use read-only token scopes: project:read, event:read, org:read.
Store the token in Sanqian secrets and avoid shell-profile based token sharing where possible.
